reasoning: While programmatic shingling recall is high (0.917), the LLM fidelity signals indicate severe content degradation, specifically the complete omission of a critical data table on page 6 and the replacement of all thematic maps and charts with placeholder boxes. In a slideshow-style coordination document, these visual data elements are core to the document's purpose, and their loss constitutes a major failure that programmatic text-matching fails to capture.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The data table on Page 6 ('Post-Matthew Ground Truth Locations') is completely omitted from the text extraction. This table contains critical data including 23 rows of Longitude, Latitude, Location, and State information for ground truth sites. Its omission constitutes a loss of nearly all data content for that section.
